summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Trello clone redesign. All UI elements, styling, and interactions work correctly. Successfully matches Trello's design and UX patterns.
passed_tests: Home page loads with Trello-like dark theme (rgb(29, 33, 37) background)
Header displays Trello logo and navigation buttons (Workspaces, Recent, Starred, Create)
Create new board tile is visible and clickable
Create board modal opens with proper styling and animations
Color picker in create board modal works (6 color swatches with selection)
Board title input field accepts and validates input correctly
Close modal button works and modal closes properly
Trello logo SVG is present with correct gradient styling
Create button has correct Trello blue background (#579DFF)
Search functionality present with proper placeholder text
User avatar displays with gradient background (AJ initials)
Workspace section shows 'YOUR WORKSPACES' header correctly
Trello Workspace branding is properly displayed
CSS variables are correctly set for Trello theme colors
Dark theme consistency across all UI elements
Header styling matches Trello design (48px height, proper borders)
Typography uses correct font family (-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI)
Responsive design elements work properly
Keyboard navigation and accessibility features function
Modal overlay and backdrop work correctly

success_percentage.backend: N/A - Frontend only testing as requested
